name: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR, processing 5-15 new hires/month tool
description: For HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR, processing 5-15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire integration. We streamline the onboarding workflow instead of manual processes with multiple tools.
target_audience: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR, processing 5-15 new hires/month
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding process leading to delays in new hire integration.
features: Centralized collection of new hire paperwork

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient onboarding process leading to delays in new hire integration.
